glyphs.name: Imbiber
glyphs.bonus: You gain +30% increased Potion Healing.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Willpower purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased damage while Healthy.

glyphs.name: Territorial
glyphs.bonus: You gain 10% Damage Reduction against Close enemies.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased damage to Close targets.
glyphs.desc_raw: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, you deal +{2/2.4/2.8/3.2/3.6/4/4.4/4.8/5.2/5.6/6/6.4/6.8/7.2/7.6/8/8.4/8.8/9.2/9.6/10}% increased damage to Close targets.

glyphs.name: Exploit
glyphs.bonus: When an enemy is damaged by you, they become Vulnerable for 3 seconds. This cannot happen more than once every 20 seconds per enemy.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased damage to Vulnerable targets.
glyphs.desc_raw: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, you deal +{2/2.3/2.6/2.9/3.2/3.5/3.8/4.1/4.4/4.7/5/5.3/5.6/5.9/6.2/6.5/6.8/7.1/7.4/7.7/8}% increased damage to Vulnerable targets.

glyphs.name: Ambidextrous
glyphs.bonus: You deal x8% increased damage while wielding One-Handed weapons.
glyphs.desc_template: Grants +{TIER}% bonus to all Magic nodes within range.

glyphs.name: Might
glyphs.bonus: You deal x8% increased damage while wielding Two-Handed weapons.
glyphs.desc_template: Grants +{TIER}% bonus to all Magic nodes within range.

glyphs.name: Cleaver
glyphs.bonus: While wielding an Axe, you deal x12% increased Critical Strike Damage.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Strength purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased damage while wielding an Axe.

glyphs.name: Seething
glyphs.bonus: While wielding a Sword, you gain 5 Fury when you kill an enemy.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Strength purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased damage while wielding a Sword.

glyphs.name: Crusher
glyphs.bonus: While wielding a Mace, you deal x20% increased Overpower damage.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Strength purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased damage while wielding a Mace.

glyphs.name: Executioner
glyphs.bonus: While wielding a Polearm, you deal x10% increased damage.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Strength purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased damage while wielding a Polearm.

glyphs.name: Ire
glyphs.bonus: While Berserking, you take 10% reduced damage from Elites.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Strength purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased damage while Berserking.

glyphs.name: Marshal
glyphs.bonus: After casting a Shout Skill, the active Cooldown of every other Non-Shout Skill is reduced by 2 seconds.
glyphs.desc_template: Grants +{TIER}% bonus to all Magic nodes within range.

glyphs.name: Bloodfeeder
glyphs.bonus: You have 5% increased Critical Strike Chance against Bleeding enemies.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased damage to Bleeding targets.
glyphs.desc_raw: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, you deal +{2/2.3/2.6/2.9/3.2/3.5/3.8/4.1/4.4/4.7/5/5.3/5.6/5.9/6.2/6.5/6.8/7.1/7.4/7.7/8}% increased damage to Bleeding targets.

glyphs.name: Wrath
glyphs.bonus: Skills that Critically Strike generate 3 Fury.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased Critical Strike Damage.
glyphs.desc_raw: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, you deal +{3/3.6/4.2/4.8/5.4/6/6.6/7.2/7.8/8.4/9/9.6/10.2/10.8/11.4/12/12.6/13.2/13.8/14.4/15}% increased Critical Strike Damage.

glyphs.name: Weapon Master
glyphs.bonus: Hitting with a Weapon Mastery Skill reduces the active Cooldown of another random Weapon Mastery Skill by 2 seconds.
glyphs.desc_template: Paragon nodes within range gain +{TIER}% bonus to their Physical damage and damage reduction modifiers.
glyphs.desc_raw: Paragon nodes within range gain +{11/13.2/15.4/17.6/19.8/22/24.2/26.4/28.6/30.8/33/35.2/37.4/39.6/41.8/44/46.2/48.4/50.6/52.8/55}% bonus to their Physical damage and damage reduction modifiers.

glyphs.name: Mortal Draw
glyphs.bonus: Swapping weapons has a 18% chance to cause the Skill's damage to Critically Strike.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, Skills that Swap to a different weapon deal +{TIER}% increased damage.

glyphs.name: Revenge
glyphs.bonus: Dealing Thorns damage to an enemy increases all damage it takes from you by x1%, up to x8%, for 10 seconds.
glyphs.desc_template: Grants +{TIER}% bonus to all Rare nodes within range.

glyphs.name: Undaunted
glyphs.bonus: You gain up to 10% Damage Reduction the more Fortify you have.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Willpower purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased damage while Fortified.
glyphs.desc_raw: For every 5 Willpower purchased within range, you deal +{2/2.3/2.6/2.9/3.2/3.5/3.8/4.1/4.4/4.7/5/5.3/5.6/5.9/6.2/6.5/6.8/7.1/7.4/7.7/8}% increased damage while Fortified.

glyphs.name: Dominate
glyphs.bonus: Every 30 seconds, your next attack will Overpower.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Willpower purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased Overpower damage.
glyphs.desc_raw: For every 5 Willpower purchased within range, you deal +{3/3.6/4.2/4.8/5.4/6/6.6/7.2/7.8/8.4/9/9.6/10.2/10.8/11.4/12/12.6/13.2/13.8/14.4/15}% increased Overpower damage.

glyphs.name: Disembowel
glyphs.bonus: Killing a Bleeding enemy has a 10% chance to reduce the Cooldowns of your Non-Ultimate active Cooldowns by 1 second.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Willpower purchased within range, you deal +{TIER}% increased Bleeding damage.
glyphs.desc_raw: For every 5 Willpower purchased within range, you deal +{2/2.3/2.6/2.9/3.2/3.5/3.8/4.1/4.4/4.7/5/5.3/5.6/5.9/6.2/6.5/6.8/7.1/7.4/7.7/8}% increased Bleeding damage.

glyphs.name: Brawl
glyphs.bonus: Brawling Skills deal x18% increased damage.
glyphs.desc_template: Paragon nodes within range gain +{TIER}% bonus to their Physical damage and damage reduction modifiers.
glyphs.desc_raw: Paragon nodes within range gain +{11/13.2/15.4/17.6/19.8/22/24.2/26.4/28.6/30.8/33/35.2/37.4/39.6/41.8/44/46.2/48.4/50.6/52.8/55}% bonus to their Physical damage and damage reduction modifiers.

glyphs.name: Twister
glyphs.bonus: You deal x13% increased damage for 4 seconds after creating a Dust Devil.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Strength purchased within range, your Dust Devils deal +{TIER}% increased damage.

glyphs.name: Rumble
glyphs.bonus: You deal x10% increased damage to Bosses and Crowd Controlled enemies for each active Earthquake.
glyphs.desc_template: For every 5 Strength purchased within range, your Earthquakes deal +{TIER}% increased damage.
